texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  students  of  Women's  Polytechnic  celebrated participating  in  the  scheduled  programs  of  Institution  of  Engineers (India),  Tripura  State  Centre.  As  a  part  of  the  celebration organised  an  Extempore  Speech  Competition  on  13/09/2019  at  the campus. The students took part in a rally in the morning in  a  seminar  titled Engineering  for  Change 15/09/2019  as  a  part  of  the  celebration.
